_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6)**_

_**User (2026-05-25 16:33:43Z)**_

Change another thing. Pagination is not working when filters are used, to be more precise, when I try to use pagination, filters are reset. Fix that and also show more records by default. Show 100 records on one page

---

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6)**_

The pagination issue is similar to the filter issue. When clicking a pagination link, the URL is built by `build_path` in `flop_components.ex`, which calls `flop_to_params`. This only includes the Flop-managed filters (status, order_number, name) but NOT the custom filters (date, guest_name, payment_method) because those were stripped out before Flop processed them.

So when you click "Next page", the URL only contains the Flop filters
